action.reasoning: Observation: The eval container's /data only contains test data (test_prompts.jsonl, images, etc.) - NO base_model directory. The base model is only available during training. The predict.py fails because it can't find the base model. Analysis: I need to merge the LoRA adapter into the base model and save the full merged model to the workspace. Then predict.py can load it directly from the checkpoint without needing the base model path. Decision: Run a script to merge LoRA into base model and save to checkpoints/merged, then update predict.py to load from merged checkpoint, then submit eval immediately.
action.command: python merge_and_save.py && echo 'Merge complete' && ls -la checkpoints/merged/
